name: textarea
description: A token-styled multi-line native <textarea>. Carries a real name (POSTs JS-off), binds via l:model on the native input/change events, aria-invalid from the invalid flag. Server-first replacement for the never-form-associated Lit island.
docs: Copies the textarea partial to your JTE root at lievit/textarea.jte, reached as @template.lievit.textarea(name=...). The native <textarea> POSTs under `name` with zero JS; bind to a wire field with `model`. The source is yours: edit freely.
